title: Close CI-RED-019 and CI-RED-003 in SPRINTS.md by current-main witness (+ handoff doc)
intent: Docs-only ledger reconciliation. Mark two stale-open CL-RED rows CLOSED in SPRINTS.md using live main CI witnesses: CI-RED-003 (debt-gates complexity ratchet — technical_debt.yml green on main) and CI-RED-019 (routing-truth editable-install mask removed + routing_truth.yml green on main). Lands together with the scoping handoff doc. No production code, no workflow files, no pyproject changes (the setuptools package finder is already on main). CI-RED-016 and CI-RED-021 remain OPEN; CI-RED-020 remains CLOSED; no C2/PR-182/PR-185 status touched.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) SPRINTS.md: CI-RED-003 summary row + detail section changed OPEN->CLOSED (2026-07-04), citing the green technical_debt.yml/debt-gates run 28693530077 @ e1310768 and the local complexity re-witness (OK: No functions exceed complexity 15); notes the batch_router.py tail no longer trips the ratcheted baseline and that closure is for the enforced debt-gates gate, not the raw complexity landscape. (2) SPRINTS.md: CI-RED-019 summary row + detail section changed OPEN->CLOSED (2026-07-04), recording that services/api/pyproject.toml now carries the explicit [tool.setuptools.packages.find] (app* only, excludes data/metrics/test_support) and that routing_truth.yml is green on main (run 28693530110 @ e1310768); keeps the mask-peel discipline explicit (closed by witness not inference; any future routing-truth red is a NEW verdict, not this setup mask). (3) docs/handoffs/CI_RED_019_003_LEDGER_RECONCILIATION_HANDOFF.md: the scoping handoff for this change. (4) this per-PR CBSP21 manifest.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: SPRINTS.md still listed CI-RED-019 and CI-RED-003 as OPEN while current main evidence shows their restore triggers are met — stale-open ledger rows drive unnecessary engineering. The closures cite concrete 2026-07-04 main witnesses (routing_truth 28693530110, technical_debt 28693530077, both @ e1310768). This is bookkeeping only: no code, workflow, or pyproject change, and CI-RED-016 (endpoint consolidation) and CI-RED-021 (branch protection) remain open by design.

commands_run: gh run list --workflow routing_truth.yml --branch main --limit 3 -> latest three runs success (28693530110 @ e1310768 push)
gh run list --workflow technical_debt.yml --branch main --limit 3 -> latest three runs success (28693530077 @ e1310768 push)
py -3.11 -m app.ci.check_complexity --baseline app/ci/complexity_baseline.json -> OK: No functions exceed complexity 15
